comments.comment: Change in production due to Covid-19

In 2019 lead was over estimated due to lead residue being captured in the sample buckets used for sampling. The sample buckets used at that time by mill personnel previously held assay flux. The issue was corrected once identified.
ECCC has been previously notified and said to have made a note on this.
